title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bout with Taiki Shuttle at the Yasuda Kinen
makes headlines, prompting many people to cram
into the Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans can't stop talking about how invigorating
Hishi Akebono's races are, and how captivating
the way she uses her size to run is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono will be making her decision about
her future today, after the Sprinters S. Her gaze is
steady and serious as she steps up to the gate.
